sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111961" key="foini/kisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φοινίκ-ισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, in pl., <sense id="n111961.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τὰ διὰ φοινίκων ἐπιθέματα</ref></xr>, cj. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.10</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φοινίσματα</foreign> codd.).</sense> </entryFree>
